name: Rethoric
long_description:
Rethoric is a LinkedIn content consultancy service and scheduling platform used by companies like Checkr, ClickUp, Storylane, Checkly, and 100+ startups and enterprises. We run your entire content operation from strategy to publishing, so you stay visible and top of mind with your ICP without spending time on it.

Our platform replaces the usual agency workflow of Google Docs, review threads, and scheduling tools. You connect your LinkedIn and Slack, and everything shows up already written, scheduled, and ready to publish.
one_liner: LinkedIn content consultancy and scheduling platform for busy founders
